title: MAX FPS Lite
description: MAX FPS Lite is the ultimate Ultra-Lite modpack, engineered for extreme stability and maximum frame rates on the weakest hardware, specifically targeting systems with only 2GB of dedicated RAM.
body:
# MAX FPS Lite: The Pure Performance Core (Ultra-Stable)

**Engineered by Z.XP.XP.900. Built for 2GB RAM Systems, Designed for Absolute FPS.**

MAX FPS Lite is the most stable and minimalistic performance modpack in the Z.XP.XP.900 lineup. This version follows a **Barebones (Ultra-Minimal)** approach, including only the absolute core optimizations required to run Minecraft on extremely weak hardware, such as PCs or laptops with **2GB of dedicated RAM**.

We have rigorously excluded all complex lighting mods, specialized threading modules, and hardware compatibility fixes to guarantee **zero crashes** and **absolute stability**.

## ⚙️ Core Architecture: Purity, Stability, and RAM Management

The entire mod list focuses on four fundamental pillars of performance: Rendering, Game Logic, Memory, and Culling.

| Mod | Category | Core Function & Impact |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Sodium** | Rendering (GPU) | **FPS Foundation:** The most powerful and stable rendering engine replacement. |
| **Lithium** | Game Logic (CPU) | Optimization of game logic and reduction of core CPU load from game ticks. |
| **FerriteCore** | Memory Management | **Vital RAM Fix:** Drastically reduces memory consumption and prevents RAM leaks. |
| **Entity Culling** | Rendering Culling | Prevents rendering of hidden entities and blocks that are not visible to the player. |

### Configuration Note (Crucial for 2GB RAM)

This modpack sacrifices aesthetics for **raw speed and purity**. To achieve peak performance, users must ensure they:
1.  Set **Graphics** to **Fast** and **Smooth Lighting** to **Off**.
2.  Set **Render Distance** to the minimum possible (recommended **2 to 4 chunks**).

## 💾 System Requirements & Target Audience

| System Component | Ideal Requirement | Performance Goal |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Dedicated RAM** | 2 GB | Consistent 60+ FPS |
| **Goal** | Absolute Stability, Lowest RAM Usage | Max FPS on weakest hardware |

---

## 🔗 The Z.XP.XP.900 Performance Tiers (Select by System)

This **MAX FPS Series** is engineered for optimal performance on different hardware levels. **Install the pack that matches your RAM and performance goal:**

| Hardware Focus | Project Name | Project Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Ultra-Lite (2 GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/max-fps-lite) | **(Current Project)** |
| **Mid-Tier (3-4 GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Balance](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-balance) | [Install Now](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-balance) |
| **High-End (16+ GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Pro](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-pro) | [Install Now](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-pro) |

---
